hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '^(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|pgcli)\b|\|\s*(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|pgcli)\b|;\s*(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|pgcli)\b|&&\s*(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|pgcli)\b|docker.*(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|pgcli)\b' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '\b(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP|ALTER|TRUNCATE|CREATE|GRANT|REVOKE)\b' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Destructive database operations via psql are forbidden. All database changes must go through drizzle-kit migrations."}' || true
